subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-21
subcodes.first_line: Our own 'war' is good because it conquers all. When a crown of thorns was placed on the head of Christ, He saw with His own eyes the crowns of kings under His feet.... If the republics of America assembled and agreed on the question of peace
subcodes.first_line_orig: جنگ خودمان خوبست که جمیع را مغلوب مینماید وقتیکه حضرت مسیح را تاج خار بر سر نهادند
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @means of establishment of future civilization, @universal peace; world unity, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
